name: community-lead-radar
title: Community lead radar
planned: source-monitor engine extraction — the reusable INGEST half of Radar's scraper base (schedule → read config → durable-cursor poll → per-adapter fetch → normalize → dedup → advance cursor) is extracted into the source-agnostic source-monitor-poller shape (now snapshotted at components/n8n/workflows/source-monitor-poller.json); Radar becomes one COMPOSITION of that engine + its own lead-qualifier + enrichment seam + notify. Future watch bricks (review-watch, changelog-monitor, job-board) reuse the same engine via config-driven SourceAdapter descriptors — config-not-code, no new scraper builder. The concrete extraction builder (_source-monitor-engine.ts) is not itself snapshotted here
